items.name: Beam search (multi-step lookahead)
items.description: Production generates ~50-200 candidates per cycle, scores each via quality, picks best path with 1-3 step lookahead. Backtest currently does single-step greedy.

items.name: ScenarioDistribution (quantile kernel)
items.description: Production uses 7-point quantile kernel covering ±2σ + 0, with seasonal_drift + supply_regime + pillars baked in. Backtest Kelly uses simple BS d2 for p_itm.

test_result.verdict: PORTED standalone-neutral — 7-point quantile too coarse to beat BS at simple p_otm; needs coupling with seasonal_drift + pillars for production-level impact

items.name: evaluate_portfolio_quality (multi-objective)
items.description: Production scores each candidate via $-normalized multi-objective: income gap + CVaR drop + delta gap + smoothness + tail hedge + pillar drift. Backtest uses simple did-it-make-money.

items.name: Concentration penalty
items.description: Production beam penalizes putting too many contracts at one strike/expiry. Backtest currently lets 25+ contracts go at the same strike.
items.expected_impact: reduces tail risk; minor return impact

test_result.verdict: PORTED but DORMANT — cap fires only 1x in 5yr because weekly rolls move to new strikes

items.name: Tail-hedge floor enforcement
items.description: Production maintains a minimum count of LONG_PUT positions (default 2) as catastrophic hedge. Backtest only has bearish_stack which fires occasionally.
items.expected_impact: lower max DD by 5-10pp in spike scenarios

test_result.verdict: WIN — Sharpe ATH 1.49; continuous tail insurance net positive

items.name: Pillar scores (tech/fund/yoy)
items.description: Production has 3-pillar scoring: technical, fundamental, year-over-year. Each contributes to composite z and quality. Backtest uses simpler 5-factor z.

test_result.verdict: PORTED but NEGATIVE — pillar boost amplifies z too much, triggers more aggressive ITM CC at wrong times. Calm regime crashed 28.9→8.6.

items.name: Smoothness metric in objective
items.description: Production penalizes jagged weekly theta distribution (income spikes followed by drops). Backtest has smoothness in state but doesn't optimize for it.
items.expected_impact: reduces NAV variance; small return impact

test_result.verdict: PORTED neutral — slight calm improvement, slight full give-up, MDD better
